Hero.subtitle: Transcribe every conversation on your device. Search across everything with AI.
Hero.desc: Zoom / Meet / Teams / Slack / In-person. All calls on your Mac gathered in one single app.

Problem.desc: Paying for an AI add-on for every single meeting tool you use? You might be spending nearly $70 a month spread across multiple services just for transcription. And worse, your data is siloed on different servers, making it impossible to search across everything.
Problem.afterDesc: Zoom / Meet / Teams / In-person all supported
afterItems: Data stays securely on your Mac
Ask AI questions across all notes
Bring your own API key. No extra fees.

rows.title: Consolidate notes, slim down costs.
rows.body: Zoom, Meet, Teams, Slack, or in-person—Reki detects and records all conversations on your Mac. From transcription to generating minutes, it's all handled in one app. Say goodbye to paying $70/month across multiple services and having your data scattered.

rows.title: Let Reki handle all your notes.
rows.body: Every call on your device transcribed. With all your conversation notes integrated into one place, Reki AI can answer any question you have about them.

rows.title: Your personalized 'Second Brain'.
rows.body: Why did we make that decision 6 months ago? What were the details of that meeting 3 years ago? Just ask the AI and get an instant answer. Your decision-making speed and accuracy will change fundamentally.

Features.chatQuestion: What were the action items with Tanaka-san last week?
Features.chatAnswer:
Here are the 3 action items:
1. Deliver the prototype by April 15th
2. Review async via Slack
3. Budget is approved internally

WorksWith.title: For every call, on your usual device.
WorksWith.desc: Since it captures audio at the OS level, just install and launch it. It catches every conversation across any service you use.

Compare.desc: Reki note is open and local-first.
Compare.footnote: * Based on public information as of April 2026

facts: Audio files are saved locally on your Mac
Transcriptions are sent directly to the AI provider you choose
Meeting notes generation runs entirely on your own AI key
Privacy.providersDesc: Use your existing AI subscriptions directly

transcript.speaker: Tanaka
transcript.text: Sales exceeded last month. What do you think is the main reason?

transcript.speaker: Matsushima
transcript.text: The main factor is the improved conversion rate of the new channel—

transcript.speaker: Tanaka
transcript.text: Please share the specific numbers by next time.

HowItWorks.calendarNote: Automatically links "who, when, what" to the audio

outputCards.title: Full-text Search
outputCards.body: Search across participants, dates, and meeting contents.

outputCards.title: AI Q&A
outputCards.body: Ask 'What were last week's decisions?' in natural language.

outputCards.title: Accumulated Assets
outputCards.body: The more you use it, the deeper the context. Your own second brain.

FinalCTA.title:
You won't be able to
live without it.
FinalCTA.desc: Start by eliminating scattered subscriptions and consolidating into one app. Once you get used to it, let AI handle your notes and searches, making your days surprisingly easier.
FinalCTA.successDesc: We will send you an email as soon as it's ready.
FinalCTA.errorGeneral: An error occurred. Please try again later.

Footer.tagline: Reki note ・ All the conversations on your device, saved to your memory.
